body: {"sprint_data":{"sprint":{"name":"Sprint 24","goal":"Complete user authentication flow and dashboard redesign","startDate":"2026-03-16","endDate":"2026-03-27","state":"closed"},"metrics":{"totalIssues":18,"completedIssues":14,"incompleteIssues":4,"totalStoryPoints":42,"completedStoryPoints":34},"completedIssues":[{"key":"AUTH-101","summary":"Implement OAuth2 login flow","type":"Story","storyPoints":8,"assignee":"Alice"},{"key":"AUTH-102","summary":"Add password reset functionality","type":"Story","storyPoints":5,"assignee":"Bob"},{"key":"DASH-201","summary":"Redesign main dashboard layout","type":"Story","storyPoints":8,"assignee":"Carol"},{"key":"DASH-202","summary":"Add widget drag-and-drop","type":"Story","storyPoints":5,"assignee":"Dave"},{"key":"BUG-301","summary":"Fix session timeout on mobile","type":"Bug","storyPoints":3,"assignee":"Alice"}],"incompleteIssues":[{"key":"AUTH-103","summary":"MFA setup wizard","type":"Story","storyPoints":5,"assignee":"Bob","reason":"Blocked by third-party API"},{"key":"DASH-203","summary":"Dashboard export to PDF","type":"Story","storyPoints":3,"assignee":"Carol","reason":"Deprioritized mid-sprint"}]},"prompt_context":{"additional_instructions":"Keep it under 5 bullet points per section."},"model_params":{"max_tokens":1024,"temperature":0.2}}
